name: YNABro
description: YNAB budget management tools for OpenClaw agents

token.description: YNAB Personal Access Token. May be a plaintext string or a SecretRef object { source, provider, id } configured via `openclaw secrets configure` or `openclaw config set ... --ref-source ...`.

defaultPlanId.description: Default YNAB plan ID selected during onboarding

token.label: YNAB Personal Access Token
token.help: Generate at https://app.ynab.com/settings/developer. Store via `openclaw secrets configure` or `openclaw config set plugins.entries.openclaw-ynabro.config.token --ref-source env|file|exec --ref-provider <provider> --ref-id <id>`.
